market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your perfect Leeds base – a roomy 5‑bedroom, 2.5‑bath entire home designed for groups of up to 11 guests and ideal for contractors or families seeking space and convenience. Every bedroom is comfortably furnished, ensuring a restful night after a busy day. The two full bathrooms plus a convenient half‑bath mean no morning queues, even with a large party. A fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare meals, while the open‑plan living area offers ample seating for group gatherings or downtime.

Parking is a standout feature: dedicated on‑site spaces make loading equipment or simply parking multiple cars effortless – a rarity in the city centre. Located in Leeds, you’re minutes from major transport links, business parks, and local attractions, putting you at the heart of both work and leisure. Although you’re a contractor‑friendly property, the home also suits holidaymakers wanting a home‑like experience.

At £229.5 per night, your rate sits 48% above the city’s median nightly price, reflecting the premium space and parking you provide. With a current 54.3% occupancy over the next 90 days, there’s clear demand. By highlighting these strengths in your listing – from capacity and parking to the convenient location – you’ll attract the right guests and boost bookings.

Book now to enjoy a spacious, well‑located Leeds home that balances work needs with comfortable living.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor or garden area for relaxation
Entertainment amenities such as high‑speed Wi‑Fi and a TV
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑quality exterior shot that shows the property’s driveway or parking area as the cover photo; it immediately signals the standout parking benefit and draws clicks.
key_diagnosis: Title is cluttered and exceeds optimal SEO focus – rewrite a concise, keyword‑rich title (under 50 chars) that spotlights capacity, parking and Leeds location.

The listing lacks any description – add a compelling 200‑300 word narrative that repeats all factual details (5 BR, 11 guests, 2.5 baths, parking, £229.5 rate, 54.3% occupancy) to inform and persuade guests.
No amenities are listed – populate the amenities section with high‑value items (parking, outdoor space, Wi‑Fi, TV, etc.) to meet guest expectations and improve search ranking.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate of £229.5 is 48% above the Leeds median, yet with a 54.3% occupancy you could capture more bookings by sharpening your title and highlighting key amenities.
